core_mechanism: renormalization-group coarse-graining flow of an effective potential toward a critical fixed point, yielding universal scaling functions and critical exponents shared by all systems in the same universality class, with an external symmetry-breaking field collapsing observables onto those functions
brief_reason: The abstract uses a non-perturbative Renormalization Group approach (in local potential approximation) to compute universal scaling functions, critical exponents, and cross-system universality-class behavior under an external symmetry-breaking field.
